fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` is an enumeration of CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) transfer function characteristics as defined in ITU-T H.273. The transfer function describes the opto-electrical or electro-optical conversion curve for a color space.

Use the values of this enumeration together with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp> when calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to construct a standard color space.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create an sRGB color space using CICP parameters
var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(
    SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709,
    SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Iec6196621);

if (colorSpace != null)
{
    var info = new SKImageInfo(800, 600, SKColorType.Rgba8888, SKAlphaType.Premul, colorSpace);
}
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies CICP transfer function characteristics as defined in ITU-T H.273.
Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer function for HDR content (ARIB STD-B67).
A linear transfer function with no gamma encoding.
Perceptual Quantizer (PQ) transfer function for HDR content (SMPTE ST 2084).
ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 10-bit content.
ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 12-bit content.
ITU-R BT.470 System B/G transfer function (gamma approximately 2.8).
ITU-R BT.470 System M transfer function (gamma approximately 2.2).
ITU-R BT.601 transfer function for standard-definition television.
ITU-R BT.709 transfer function for high-definition television.
SMPTE ST 428-1 transfer function for D-Cinema.
An unknown or unspecified transfer function.
